modern.version_update: Wiener Linien Austria updated to v{v} — please reload

editor.sensors_hint: Pick one or more stops to display
editor.filters_hint: Optionally restrict lines or direction per stop
editor.walk_time_hint: Hide departures that would already be gone by the time you reach the platform. Leave blank for no filter.
editor.colors_hint: Optional overrides. Metro defaults are already set.
editor.no_sensors_available: No Wiener Linien sensors available. Add a stop first via Settings → Devices & Services.
editor.no_lines_available: Lines appear here once stops are selected.

retro.version_update: Retro card updated to v{v} — please reload

editor.direction_hint: Outbound or return — the retro display only shows one direction.
editor.line_hint: Optional: restrict to a single line. Tap the active chip again to show all lines.
editor.walk_time_hint: Hide departures that would already be gone by the time you reach the platform. Leave blank for no filter.
editor.walk_time_no_data: No departures in this direction. Switch direction or wait until the sensor reports lines.
editor.station_hint: “Default” uses the line colour for U-Bahn stops and white for everything else. Or force white or black for all stops.
editor.no_sensors: No Wiener Linien sensors available. Add a stop first via Settings → Devices & Services.
editor.no_lines: The sensor currently reports no lines for this stop + direction.
